LSE-HS9-L4-1400P-HSSCIES-QBL-LAT-02 • HS Earth & Space Science Grade 9 • Plate Tectonics & Crustal Rock Ages

The Ridge Below Veracruz

Click   🎧   to listen.
Listen to a conversation between a girl and a boy. Listen carefully. You will hear the conversation only once. After listening, you will answer a question.
Listen to the Conversation
QUESTION:
What is the girl trying to decide?
Choose the best answer. You may change your answer before submitting.
SMART SUPPORT:
Go back to the conversation. Construct a complete academic justification. State your claim about what the girl is trying to decide, support that claim with reasoning drawn directly from what she says about the quest and the rocks she was given, and articulate the conclusion that follows about what unlocking the next level requires.
